mapper.select:
/* wms-inventory-invnhold-sql-oracle.xml - selectInvnHoldList */
ORDER BY IVLC.CTKEY , IVLC.OWKEY , IVLC.LCKEY , IVLC.ICKEY , IVLC.IVATKEY
mapper.sql:
/* wms-inventory-invnhold-sql-oracle.xml - selectInvnHoldRefSql - 재고 보류 조회 SQL */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.CTKEY , (SELECT CTNAME FROM TWORK_MST_CT CT WHERE CT.CTKEY = A.CTKEY) AS CTNAME , A.IVATKEY , A.LCKEY , A.ULCKEY , A.LOGGRPCD , A.OWKEY , (SELECT OWNAME FROM TWORK_MST_OW OW WHERE OW.OWKEY = A.OWKEY) AS OWNAME , A.ICKEY , ROUND(A.TTQTY / COALESCE(F.ICUTQTY, 1), 2) AS TTQTY_UNIT , ROUND(A.AVQTY / COALESCE(F.ICUTQTY, 1), 2) AS AVQTY_UNIT , ROUND(A.ALQTY / COALESCE(F.ICUTQTY, 1), 2) AS ALQTY_UNIT , ROUND(A.PIQTY / COALESCE(F.ICUTQTY, 1), 2) AS PIQTY_UNIT , ROUND(A.PAQTY / COALESCE(F.ICUTQTY, 1), 2) AS PAQTY_UNIT , ROUND(A.HOQTY / COALESCE(F.ICUTQTY, 1), 2) AS HOQTY_UNIT , A.TTQTY , A.AVQTY , A.ALQTY , A.PIQTY , A.PAQTY , A.HOQTY , B.PRODUCTDATE , B.EXPIREDATE , A.IVATSTATUS , A.IVATSTATUS AS IVATSTATUS_IVHD , CASE WHEN H.WKSTATUS = '10' THEN H.REASONTYPE WHEN A.IVATSTATUS = '10' THEN NULL ELSE ( SELECT REASONTYPE FROM ( SELECT REASONTYPE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVHS IVHS WHERE IVHS.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND IVHS.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND IVHS.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND IVHS.IVATKEY = A.IVATKEY AND IVHS.IVHSTYPE = '70' ORDER BY INSERTDATE DESC ) LIMIT 1 ) END AS REASONTYPE , CASE WHEN H.WKSTATUS = '10' THEN H.COMMENTS WHEN A.IVATSTATUS = '10' THEN NULL ELSE ( SELECT COMMENTS FROM ( SELECT COMMENTS FROM TWORK_INFO_IVHS IVHS WHERE IVHS.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND IVHS.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND IVHS.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND IVHS.IVATKEY = A.IVATKEY AND IVHS.IVHSTYPE = '70' ORDER BY INSERTDATE DESC ) LIMIT 1 ) END AS COMMENTS , '' AS IVHO_DESC , B.UOM , C.ICNAME , C.SPEC , G.ACKEY , G.ACNAME , B.ATTRIBUTE3 AS BLNO , B.ATTRIBUTE4 AS INVOICENO , B.IBCONFIRMDATE , '10' AS INCHANNELCD , H.WKSTATUS AS REQ_WKSTATUS , H.IF_STATUS , H.IF_STATUS_MSG , H.IVAT_HOLD_TYPE , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC A INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.IVATKEY = B.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = C.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUT D ON C.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND C.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND C.ICUTKEY = D.ICUTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE F ON C.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND C.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND C.ICUTKEY = F.ICUTKEY AND B.UOM = F.ICUTTYPE LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_AC G ON C.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND C.OWKEY = G.OWKEY AND C.ACKEY = G.ACKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT_HOLD_REQ H ON A.CTKEY = H.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = H.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = H.ICKEY AND A.LCKEY = H.LCKEY AND A.IVATKEY = H.IVATKEY AND D.CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate} ) WHERE TTQTY > 0
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select: ORDER BY OWKEY , LCKEY , ICKEY , ULCKEY , IVATKEY

/* wms-inventory-invnhold-sql-oracle.xml - selectTWorkInfoIvat - 재고 속성 조회 SQL */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , IVATKEY , LOGGRPCD , IVATKEY , IVATSTATUS , EXPIREDATE , IBCONFIRMDATE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVAT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IVATKEY = #{ivatkey}

/* wms-inventory-invnhold-sql-oracle.xml - selectTWorkMstLc - 로케이션 정보 조회 SQL */ SELECT CTKEY , LCKEY , LCTYPE , LCHOLDTYPE , LCSTORTYPE , LCSEQ , ARKEY , PIZNKEY , FLOOR , WIDTH , LENGTH , HEIGHT , CAPACITY , ABC , ISMIXICKEY , ISMIXIVATKEY , LOGGRPCD FROM TWORK_MST_LC WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND LCKEY = #{lckey}
mapper.sql:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT B.CTKEY ,B.IVHD_HDKEY ,B.IVHD_DTKEY ,B.LOGGRPCD ,B.CTKEY || ';' ||'LOGGRPCD'||';' || B.LOGGRPCD AS LOGGRPCD_DESC ,B.OWKEY ,D.OWNAME ,B.ICKEY ,F.ICKEY AS FR_ICKEY ,E.ICNAME ,E.SPEC ,B.LCKEY ,F.LCKEY AS FR_LCKEY ,B.IVATKEY ,F.IVATKEY AS FR_IVATKEY ,B.REASONTYPE ,B.CTKEY || ';' ||'IVHD_REASONTYPE'|| ';' || B.REASONTYPE AS RESONTYPE_DESC ,A.IVHD_HDTYPE ,B.CTKEY || ';' ||'IVHD_HDTYPE'|| ';' || A.IVHD_HDTYPE AS IVHD_HDTYPE_DESC ,B.WKSTATUS ,B.CTKEY || ';' ||'IVHD_WKSTATUS'|| ';' || B.WKSTATUS AS IVHD_WKSTATUS_DESC ,B.ATTRIBUTE3 AS BLNO ,G.ATTRIBUTE3 AS FR_BLNO ,B.ATTRIBUTE4 AS INVOICENO ,G.ATTRIBUTE4 AS FR_INVOICENO ,B.IBCONFIRMDATE ,G.IBCONFIRMDATE AS FR_IBCONFIRMDATE ,F.ULCKEY ,F.IVATSTATUS ,B.CTKEY || ';' || 'IVATSTATUS' ||';'|| F.IVATSTATUS AS IVATSTATUS_DESC ,F.TTQTY / I.ICUTQTY AS TTQTY ,F.AVQTY / I.ICUTQTY AS AVQTY ,F.ALQTY / I.ICUTQTY AS ALQTY ,F.PIQTY / I.ICUTQTY AS PIQTY ,F.PAQTY / I.ICUTQTY AS PAQTY ,F.HOQTY / I.ICUTQTY AS HOQTY ,B.INSERTDATE ,B.INSERTURKEY ,B.UPDATEDATE ,B.UPDATEURKEY ,'' AS IVATSTATUS_IVHD FROM TWORK_INFO_IVHD_HD A INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVHD_DT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.IVHD_HDKEY = B.IVHD_HDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT C ON B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW D ON B.OWKEY = D.OWKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC E ON B.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND B.ICKEY = E.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUT H ON E.CTKEY = H.CTKEY AND E.ICUTKEY = H.ICUTKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE I ON E.CTKEY = I.CTKEY AND E.ICUTKEY = I.ICUTKEY AND E.UOM = I.ICUTTYPE LEFT JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC F ON B.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND B.IVATKEY = F.IVATKEY AND B.ICKEY = F.ICKEY AND B.LCKEY = F.LCKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT G ON B.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND B.IVATKEY = G.IVATKEY WHERE 1=1 ) WHERE 1=1
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select: SELECT '' CRTSEQ, 'A' AUD, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') CRTDATETIME, '' EVENTKEY, B.ULCKEY BARCODE, B.ICKEY PARTNO, (SELECT ICNAME FROM TWORK_MST_IC WHERE CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY) PARTNAME, B.TTQTY LODQTY, #{mv_qty} MVQTY, (SELECT UOM FROM TWORK_MST_IC WHERE CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY) UOM, '' FROMCNVNO, COALESCE(#{tocnvno}, 2) TOCNVNO, C.SCRANENO, C.STORAGENO LOCLOCN , C.STORAGEDEPTH LOCDEPTH, COALESCE(#{toLckey}, 'PICKTO_A') MOVLOCN, '0' MOVDEPTH, C.ISHIGH, B.OWKEY POWNER, (SELECT OWNAME FROM TWORK_MST_OW WHERE OWKEY = B.OWKEY) POWNER_WNAME, A.CTKEY, CASE C.STORAGEDEPTH WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END PRINO, A.LCKEY, B.IVATKEY, B.ICKEY, D.PRODUCTLOT, #{emrgncy_ob_yn} EMRGNCY_OB_YN FROM TWORK_MST_LC A , TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC B , TWORK_MST_LCXFACILITY C , TWORK_INFO_IVAT D WHERE A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.LCKEY = B.LCKEY AND A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.LCKEY = C.LCKEY AND B.TTQTY > 0 AND B.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND B.IVATKEY = D.IVATKEY AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.LCKEY = #{lckey} AND B.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND B.IVATKEY = #{ivatkey} AND B.ULCKEY = #{ulckey} AND B.ICKEY = #{ickey}
SELECT 'N' FROM TWORK_MST_LCXFACILITY WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND LCKEY = #{lckey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IF_RWCS_TEMP ( CTKEY, CRTSEQ, AUD, CRTDATETIME, EVENTKEY, WORKKIND, WCSKEY, BARCODE, POWNER, PARTNO, PARTNAME, LODQTY, PICKQTY, UOM, FROMCNVNO, TOCNVNO, LOCLOCN, LOCDEPTH, MOVLOCN, WORKSTATUS, ISHIGH, SCRANENO, ALLSTATUS, WKSTATUS, IOKEY, ALLCKEY, PRODUCTLOT, EMRGNCY_OB_YN ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} ,TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYMMDD') || LPAD(nextval('crtseq_seq')::TEXT, 6, '0') ,'A' ,TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYMMDDHH24MI') || LPAD(currval('crtseq_seq')::TEXT, 6, '0') ,CASE WHEN #{lodqty} != COALESCE(#{mvqty}, 0) AND COALESCE(#{mvqty}, 0) >0 THEN '2' ELSE '1' END , 0 ,#{barcode} ,#{powner} ,#{partno} ,#{partname} ,#{lodqty} ,#{mvqty} ,#{uom} , '512' ,#{tocnvno} ,(SELECT STORAGENO FROM TWORK_MST_LCXFACILITY WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND LCKEY = #{lckey}) ,(SELECT STORAGEDEPTH FROM TWORK_MST_LCXFACILITY WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND LCKEY = #{lckey}) ,'STAGE' ,'0' ,#{ishigh} ,(SELECT SCRANENO FROM TWORK_MST_LCXFACILITY WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND LCKEY = #{lckey} ) ,'N' ,'M' ,TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYMMDD') || LPAD(#{ivmvSeq}::TEXT, 6, '0') ,nextval('allcate_seq') ,#{productlot} ,#{emrgncy_ob_yn} )
mapper.select: /* wms-inventory-invnhold-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatByErp - 재고 속성 PK 조회 SQL */ SELECT A.CTKEY, A.IVATKEY, A.LCKEY, A.ULCKEY, A.OWKEY, A.ICKEY , A.TTQTY, A.AVQTY, A.ALQTY, A.PIQTY, A.PAQTY, A.HOQTY, A.LOQTY, A.IVATSTATUS , B.UOM, A.LOGGRPCD FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC A , TWORK_INFO_IVAT B WHERE A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.IVATKEY = B.IVATKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND A.ICKEY = #{ickey} AND B.EXPIREDATE = #{expiredate}

/* wms-inventory-invnhold-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatByPk - 재고 속성 PK 조회 SQL */ SELECT A.CTKEY , A.IVATKEY , A.LCKEY , A.ULCKEY , A.OWKEY , A.ICKEY , COALESCE(A.TTQTY, 0) AS TTQTY , COALESCE(A.AVQTY, 0) AS AVQTY , COALESCE(A.ALQTY, 0) AS ALQTY , COALESCE(A.PIQTY, 0) AS PIQTY , COALESCE(A.PAQTY, 0) AS PAQTY , COALESCE(A.HOQTY, 0) AS HOQTY , COALESCE(A.LOQTY, 0) AS LOQTY , A.IVATSTATUS , B.UOM , A.LOGGRPCD FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC A , TWORK_INFO_IVAT B WHERE A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.IVATKEY = B.IVATKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND A.LCKEY = #{lckey} AND A.ICKEY = #{ickey} AND B.EXPIREDATE = #{expiredate}
